extortion.description: [AI generated] Capital Fine Meats is a Canadian company that specializes in handcrafted & naturally wood-smoked meat products. It was established in 1929 and is a family-owned business. Their product line includes sausages, hams, bacons, and other ready-to-eat smoked meats. Known for their quality and exceptional taste, they ship to retailers across Canada. They practice the most stringent food safety procedures and hold a Level 2 SQF certification.
